candidates.why: Explicitly labelled as COGS-related D&A, but it appears as a component/detail of the selected total COGS bucket ('Cost of revenues/COGS'), not a separate same-level operating line to add on top. Adding it would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: COGS-related amortization detail, but it appears nested within cost of revenues rather than outside the selected COGS total. It should be treated as already embedded in the selected parent row.

candidates.row_label: Amortization and Depreciation Cost of Goods Sold
candidates.why: This looks like a COGS D&A summary, but it still appears to be a component of the selected COGS total ('Cost of revenues/COGS' equals the higher COGS figure and nearby lower COGS rows/balancing structure imply decomposition). Conservative treatment is that it is already included.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the explicit total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. The visible COGS D&A rows look like breakdown components of that total, not separate same-level operating expenses to add later. Therefore no separate COGS_DA row should be added.

candidates.why: Selling-related D&A is explicitly shown, but 'Selling expenses - Balancing value' plus this D&A equals 'Selling expenses', indicating the selected parent row already includes it. Do not add separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This appears as a sub-component of the selected Selling and Administrative expense totals, not as a separate same-level operating row outside those buckets. Adding it would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization detail within SG&A. It appears to be embedded in the selected Selling/Administrative parent rows rather than separate from them.
Administrative D&A detail, but it appears to be part of the selected 'Administrative expenses' total, not an add-on outside the bucket.

candidates.row_label: Amortization including Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D amortization detail sits under the explicitly selected 'Research and development expenses' row. Because that same R&D row is already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, the special R&D rule says not to add R&D D&A separately here.
R&D depreciation component under the selected R&D total. Since the above-operating R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, this should not be separately added.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Research and Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is another R&D amortization component that appears included in the selected total 'Research and development expenses'. Under the explicit R&D row / XRD symmetry rule, it should not be separately added.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', and 'Research and development expenses'. The D&A rows shown for selling, administrative, and R&D appear to be sub-components embedded in those selected totals. The selling section explicitly shows a balancing line confirming inclusion, and R&D is already handled symmetrically through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD. Therefore no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
